name: Auth Service
simple_explanation: This handles proving who a user is. When someone logs in, it checks their email and password against the database. If correct, it creates a JWT token for future requests.
detailed_explanation: Core functions: login(email, password), refreshToken(token), logout(userId). Uses bcrypt for password comparison and stores refresh tokens in Redis with 30-day TTL.
gotchas: If Redis is down, refresh token validation fails even for valid tokens.
